meaning: 刘易斯[英国英格兰东南部城市](东苏塞克斯郡首府)
examples: The first was the Battle of Lewes in 1264.
You change at Lewes and East Croydon.
“Jugs” was the Lewes slang for Brighton folk.
Brighton and the Lewes Downs became a Biosphere Reserve in the UK in 2014.
Lewes council leader James Page said the decision was a massive boost for the local economy.
